dialog.stockEnabledHint: Stock is tracked automatically & limited during checkout.
dialog.stockDisabledHint: Product always available, stock is not tracked (e.g. services, made-to-order items).
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Additional notes/info, e.g.: contains 5 pcs, spice level, supplier

toast.noCategory: Create a category first before adding products
toast.skuExists: SKU "{{sku}}" is already used by product "{{name}}"

barcodeScanner.title: Scan Barcode
barcodeScanner.permissionTip: Tip: After changing permissions in Settings, reopen the app.
barcodeScanner.scanHint: Point the barcode inside the scan box
barcodeScanner.flashUnsupported: Flash is not supported on this device
barcodeScanner.httpsRequired: The app must be accessed via HTTPS to use the camera.
barcodeScanner.browserUnsupported: Browser does not support camera access. Try updating the app or use another browser.
barcodeScanner.permissionDeniedNative: Camera permission denied. Go to device Settings > Apps > FreeKasir > Permissions, then enable Camera.
barcodeScanner.permissionDeniedWeb: Camera permission denied. Click the lock icon in the address bar and allow camera access.
barcodeScanner.permissionDeniedGeneric: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access and try again.
barcodeScanner.noCamera: No camera found on this device.
barcodeScanner.cameraInUse: Camera is being used by another app. Close other apps and try again.
barcodeScanner.cameraConfigUnsupported: Camera does not support the requested configuration.
barcodeScanner.securityBlocked: Camera access blocked for security reasons. Make sure the app is accessed via HTTPS.
barcodeScanner.startFailed: Failed to start scanner ({{name}}). Try closing and reopening.
